steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to provide an example of a sky island, which requires naming a specific mountain range mentioned in the notes.

steps.title: Find the example
steps.content: Choice C directly names the El Pinito Mountains with the phrase “such as,” fulfilling the goal of providing an example. Choices A, B, and D offer general definitions or descriptions of sky islands without citing any specific example. That matches choice C — C is correct.
